items.a: Ongles Rivières is at Centre Les Rivières, 4225 boulevard des Forges, Trois-Rivières, QC G8Y 1W2. The salon is accessible directly from the shopping centre.
We're open Monday to Wednesday 9:30 a.m.–5:30 p.m., Thursday and Friday 9 a.m.–9 p.m., Saturday 9 a.m.–5 p.m., and Sunday 10 a.m.–5 p.m.

items.q: How do I book an appointment?
items.a: Book online from our Book Online page, or phone (819) 378-8228. Walk-in visits are accepted based on availability.
Yes. Centre Les Rivières offers plenty of free parking, just steps from the salon entrance.

items.q: How do I get there by public transit?
items.a: Centre Les Rivières is served by the Trois-Rivières bus network. Get off at the shopping-centre stop, then head to the salon inside.

items.q: Should I expect a wait on weekends?
items.a: Weekends are busier, especially Saturday. Walk-ins are welcome based on availability, but a reservation secures your time slot.

items.q: Do I need to leave a deposit?
items.a: Most everyday services require no deposit. For group appointments or extended services a deposit may be requested; we'll let you know when you book.
You can reschedule or cancel your appointment. A few hours' notice helps us offer the slot to another client; a phone call is enough.

items.q: How much does a full set cost?
items.a: The price varies with the service and finishes you choose. A full set starts at an affordable rate, and a fill costs less than a new set. See the Services page for current pricing.
Solid colours are included. Elaborate nail-art designs may carry an extra charge based on time and complexity; ask for an estimate before we begin.
Yes. Share your preference when booking and we'll try to pair you with the same technician, subject to availability.

items.q: Do you offer gel polish for manicures?
items.a: Yes. Manicures are available with regular polish or long-wearing gel polish. Tell us your choice and we'll suggest the most suitable option.
We offer nail enhancements (full set), fills, hand care and foot care. All the details are on our Services page.
